name: Slash/Dots.
short_description: Let's cut wood and hit balls against each other ! Simple refreshed puzzle game "Slash/Dots" !

"Slash/Dots." is a physics puzzle game, where you cut wood and hit balls against each other.
There are over a 100 stages ranging from crystal-clear easy to mind-boggling difficulty.
